activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with explicit invoice reference
EU origin normalization and acceptance of additional EU member states

consignor.certificate_value: BraunAbility Europe AB Åkerivägen7 44361, Stenkullen Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: BraunAbility Europe AB Åkerivägen 7 44361 STENKULLEN SWEDEN
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'BraunAbility Europe AB' with address in Stenkullen Sweden is explicitly found in the invoice in header and address block with matching country. Allowed normalizations for spacing, casing, and company form were applied. No mismatches in company name or country detected.

consignee.certificate_value: Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari Sarıhamzalı Mahallesi Turhan Cemal Beriker Bulvarı Adana No:563/A 01110 Seyhan Türkiye
consignee.invoice_value: Temsa Skoda Sabanci Ulasim Araclari A.Ş. Sarıhamzalı Mahallesi Turhan Cemal Beriker Bulvarı No:563/A Seyhan 01110 Adana TÜRKIYE
consignee.motivation: Consignee name and address in certificate matches exactly the invoice's 'Invoice address' field with permitted normalizations (e.g. accents and abbreviations). Country 'Türkiye' matches invoice country 'TÜRKIYE' after normalization. The consignee is found and verified in the primary invoice field. No conflicts noted.

goods_description.invoice_value: RT25 Grey Rail Insert 25M RT25 and related packaging and fees
goods_description.motivation: The certificate contains a general goods description 'Disability aids' combined with an explicit reference to invoice number 185678, invoice date 2026-03-02, and order no BP176384, consistent with prior rule allowing general description when invoice reference with date is included (4.3.5). However, the invoice item descriptions ('Grey Rail Insert') do not exactly match 'Disability aids' and no exact article numbers exist to verify. Due to this disparity, product description verification requires manual review.

quantity.invoice_value: Total Gross Weight: 120 KG, Total Net Weight: 110 KG, Total No of Pallets: 1
quantity.motivation: Quantity verification matches '1 pallet' in certificate with 'Total No of Pallets: 1' in invoice, and gross weight 120 KG in certificate aligns with invoice total gross weight 120 KG. Weight units and categories match exactly. The reference to invoice number and date supports the direct verification. Hence, quantity verification is a match.

origin.motivation: Origin 'United kingdom' in certificate matches explicitly 'Country of origin: United Kingdom' in invoice after normalization of casing and spacing. No conflicting origin countries found. EU origin normalization activated but not changing the UK origin. Hence, origin verification is a match.

manual_review_triggers: 4.3 General goods description verification requires manual review due to mismatch between product descriptions
overall_assessment.decision_summary: All critical control points except goods description matching are verified as MATCH. Goods description cannot be exactly matched but certificate refers to invoice number with date. Manual review recommended due to general description with no exact article number or direct text match.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter utom varubeskrivningen stämmer. Varubeskrivningen är allmän och matchar inte exakt fakturans itembeskrivningar, varför manuell granskning behövs.
